text: There is no soaring departure, no triumphant cry to the heavens.
The Ascent is a grim march.
Skyrith, whose wings once owned the sky, now fears the very wind that buffets him.
Each step is an agony, a testament to the bond that drags him upward.
Kale walks beside him, a steady hand on his foreleg, her heart breaking with every
They are climbing into the domain of the storm itself, where the air grows thin and the
